design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Replace concrete field types with the Command interface to adhere to the Dependency Inversion Principle.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.before:
private TV tv = TV.getInstance();
    private VolumeUpCommand volumeUpCommand = new VolumeUpCommand(tv);

design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.general_idea: Update TV singleton access from getInstance() method to INSTANCE field.
Add explicit cast to concrete class to access specific method on interface-typed field.
Remove unused imports for ArrayList and List.
Refactor the singleton implementation from a class with a static instance field to an enum singleton.
design_patterns/src/main/java/com/ak/lea.before: public final class TV { private static final TV instance = new TV(); public static final TV getInstance() { return instance; }

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore Eclipse IDE metadata files and directories.
Add pattern to ignore Java heap dump files generated by the JVM.
